Object.name: RELJAS096
Object.description: DRE - Demostrativo do Resultado do Exercício

Part.Source:
loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) If &Context.PesCod = 0 Return EndIf
&PesRaz = &Context.PesRaz For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &FilFan = FilFan Exit EndFor
MB 4 MT 2
Header &titulo = 'DEMOSTRATIVO DO RESULTADO DO EXERCÍCIO - DRE' print Cabecalho End &PedDtaFat = &DtaIni &PedDtaFat_Go = &DtaFin
//RECEITA BRUTA DE VENDAS Do 'ZerarTotalPedido'
&PedVlrDscGlb = 0 &PedVlrGnre = 0 &PedVlrIpi = 0 &PedVlrOut = 0 &PedFrtFix = 0 &PedVlrOutCus = 0
For each Pedido Order EmpCod,FilCod,PedSts,LctAtuEst,PedStsFin,LctTip,PedDtaFat Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO Where PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.FECHADO Where LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida Where LctTip = TipoLancamento.SaidaMercadoria Where PedDtaFat >= &PedDtaFat and PedDtaFat <= &PedDtaFat_Go
&PedVlrDscGlb += PedVlrDscGlb &PedVlrGnre += PedVlrGnre &PedVlrIpi += PedVlrIpi &PedVlrOut += PedVlrOut &PedFrtFix += PedVlrFrt &PedVlrOutCus += PedVlrOutCus
For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,PedCod,PedQtd,GrupHiePadL,ProGraRefPadL where PedQtd > 0
&CarCreVlrDup = 0 //Cartão &DinCreVlrDup = 0 //Dinheiro &DupCreVlrDup = 0 //Duplicata &ChePCreVlrDup = 0 //Cheque Próprio &CheTCreVlrDup = 0 //Cheque Terceiro
If &PedCod <> PedCod RetornaTipoPgtoDuplicata.call(EmpCod,PedCod,FilCod,&CarCreVlrDup,&DinCreVlrDup,&DupCreVlrDup,&ChePCreVlrDup,&CheTCreVlrDup) &TotCarCreVlrDup += &CarCreVlrDup //Cartão &TotDinCreVlrDup += &DinCreVlrDup //Dinheiro &TotDupCreVlrDup += &DupCreVlrDup //Duplicata &TotChePCreVlrDup += &ChePCreVlrDup //Cheque Próprio &TotCheTCreVlrDup += &CheTCreVlrDup //Cheque Terceiro EndIf
Do case Case ProTipDef = Definicao.FABRICADO //1- VENDA DE PRODUTOS &ProPedVlrCus += round((PedVlrCus * PedQtd),2) &ProPedVlrBrt += PedVlrItm &ProPedVlrLiq += PedVlrItmComDsc
Case ProTipDef = Definicao.REVENDA //2- VENDA DE MERCADORIAS &MerPedVlrCus += round((PedVlrCus * PedQtd),2) &MerPedVlrBrt += PedVlrItm &MerPedVlrLiq += PedVlrItmComDsc
Case ProTipDef = Definicao.SERVICO //3- PRESTAÇÃO DE SERVIÇOS &SerPedVlrCus += round((PedVlrCus * PedQtd),2) &SerPedVlrBrt += PedVlrItm &SerPedVlrLiq += PedVlrItmComDsc EndCase
&PedCod = PedCod EndFor EndFor //após coletado informações começa imprimir
Print ReceitaBruta
//#################################### Produto If &ProPedVlrBrt > 0 Print ReceitaVendaProduto Print ReceitaVendaProdutoTotal EndIf
//################################### Mercadorias If &MerPedVlrBrt > 0 Print ReceitaVendaMercadorias Print ReceitaVendaMercadoriasTotal EndIf
//################################### Serviços If &SerPedVlrBrt > 0 Print ReceitaVendaServicos Print ReceitaVendaServicosTotal EndIf
//##################################### Total outros acrescimos &OutTotPedVlrLiq = 0 &OutTotPedVlrLiq = (&PedVlrGnre +&PedVlrIpi + &PedVlrOut + &PedFrtFix + &PedVlrOutCus)
If &OutTotPedVlrLiq > 0 print OutrosCustos EndIf
&GerTotPedVlrLiq = (&ProPedVlrLiq+&MerPedVlrLiq+&SerPedVlrLiq) + &OutTotPedVlrLiq
//##################################### Total liquido da receita If &GerTotPedVlrLiq > 0 Print TotalReceita Endif
Print Deducoes
If &PedVlrDscGlb > 0 Print Descontos EndIf
//plano de contas de deduções &TotMovVlr = 0 &MovVlr = 0 &PlanCod = 0 For each Order EmpCod,PlanGrpDre,MovDtaCon Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where MovDtaCon >= &DtaIni and MovDtaCon <= &Dtafin Where PlanGrpDre = GrupoDRE.DeducaoReceita Where MovItmSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovItmSts.IsEmpty() or MovItmSts.IsNull() Where MovSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovSts.IsNull() or MovSts.IsEmpty()
If PlanCod <> &PlanCod If not &PlanCod.isEmpty() and &MovVlr > 0 Print DetailDeducoes // imprimi as despesas de venda &MovVlr = 0 EndIf EndIf &PlanCod = PlanCod &PlanCodNom = PlanCodNom &MovVlr += MovItmVlr &TotMovVlr += MovItmVlr
EndFor
//##################################### // imprimi as despesas de venda ex: simples nacional If not &PlanCod.isEmpty() and &MovVlr > 0 Print DetailDeducoes &MovVlr = 0 EndIf
&TotPedVlrLiq = ((&ProPedVlrLiq+&MerPedVlrLiq+&SerPedVlrLiq) - &PedVlrDscGlb) + &PedVlrGnre +&PedVlrIpi + &PedVlrOut + &PedFrtFix + &PedVlrOutCus &TotPedVlrBrt = ((&ProPedVlrBrt+&MerPedVlrBrt+&SerPedVlrBrt) - &PedVlrDscGlb) + &PedVlrGnre +&PedVlrIpi + &PedVlrOut + &PedFrtFix + &PedVlrOutCus
&TotLiqPedVlrBrt = &TotPedVlrLiq - &TotMovVlr Print Receitaliquida
//####################################################################################################### //Custos Print CustoVendas //#################################### Produto If &ProPedVlrCus > 0 Print CustoVendaProduto Print CustoVendaProdutoTotal EndIf
//################################### Mercadorias If &MerPedVlrCus > 0 Print CustoVendaMercadoria Print CustoVendaMercadoriaTotal EndIf
//################################### Serviços If &SerPedVlrCus > 0 Print CustoVendaServico Print CustoVendaServicoTotal EndIf &TotBrtPedVlrBrt = &TotLiqPedVlrBrt - &SerPedVlrCus - &MerPedVlrCus -&ProPedVlrCus Print ResultadoBruto //############################################################################################################## DESPESAS OPERACIONAIS
//Despesa Print DespesasOperacionais &TotOpeMovVlr = 0 //zera o operacional pois vai soma as despesas
Do 'DespesaComVenda' If &TotVenMovVlr > 0 Print TotalVendas EndIf
Do 'DespesaAdministrativas' If &TotAdmMovVlr > 0 Print TotalAdm EndIf
Do 'DespesaComPessoal' If &TotPesMovVlr > 0 Print TotalPessoal EndIf
If &TotOpeMovVlr > 0 &TotOpeMovVlr = &TotOpeMovVlr * (-1) EndIf
Print TotalOperacional
//############################################################################################################ DESPESAS / RECEITAS FINANCEIRAS Print DESPESARECITAFINANCEIRA &ResFinMovVlr = 0 //zera o operacional pois vai soma as despesas
Do 'ReceitasFinanceiras' If &TotRecMovVlr > 0 Print totalRecFin EndiF
Do 'DespesasFinanceiras' If &TotFinMovVlr > 0 Print TotalDesFin EndiF
Do 'DespesasMonetarias' If &TotMonMovVlr > 0 Print TotalVariacao EndiF
&ResTotFinMovVlr = &TotRecMovVlr - &TotFinMovVlr - &TotMonMovVlr Print TotalFinanceiro //############################################################################################################ OUTRAS DESPESAS / RECEITAS FINANCEIRAS Print OutrasReceDesp Do 'OutrasReceitas' If &TotOutRecMovVlr > 0 Print totalOutrasRec EndiF
Do 'OutrasDespesas' If &TotOutDspMovVlr > 0 Print TotalOutrasDesp EndiF
&ResTotOutMovVlr = &TotOutRecMovVlr - &TotOutDspMovVlr Print TotalOutros
&TotOpePedVlrBrt = &TotBrtPedVlrBrt + &TotOpeMovVlr + &ResTotFinMovVlr + &ResTotOutMovVlr Print ResOperAnterior
//############################################################################################################ PROVISOES Do 'Provisao'
If &TotProvMovVlr > 0 Print TotalProvisao EndIf
&TotProvMovVlr = &TotProvMovVlr * (-1) &TotDreMovVlr = &TotOpePedVlrBrt + &TotProvMovVlr Print DreFim
If &IsMostrarPlanosSemDre = True Eject Do 'PlanosSemDre' Print TotalSemDre EndIf
Footer print Rodape End
Sub 'DespesaComVenda' &TotVenMovVlr = 0 &MovVlr = 0 &Venda = 1 &PlanCod = 0 For each Order EmpCod,PlanGrpDre,PlanHiePadL,MovDtaCon Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where MovDtaCon >= &DtaIni and MovDtaCon <= &Dtafin Where PlanGrpDre = GrupoDRE.DespesaVen Where MovItmSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovItmSts.IsEmpty() or MovItmSts.IsNull() Where MovSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovSts.IsNull() or MovSts.IsEmpty()
If &Venda = 1 // imprimi cabeçalho das venda se tiver registro Print DespesaComVendas &Venda = 2 EndIf
If PlanCod <> &PlanCod If not &PlanCod.isEmpty() Print DetailVendas // imprimi as despesas de venda &MovVlr = 0 EndIf EndIf &PlanCod = PlanCod &PlanCodNom = PlanCodNom &MovVlr += MovItmVlr &TotVenMovVlr += MovItmVlr
EndFor If &MovVlr > 0 Print DetailVendas // imprimi as despesas de venda EndIf
&MovVlr = 0 &TotOpeMovVlr += &TotVenMovVlr EndSub
Sub 'DespesaAdministrativas' &TotAdmMovVlr = 0 &Adm = 1 &MovVlr = 0 &PlanCod = 0 For each Order EmpCod,PlanGrpDre,PlanHiePadL,MovDtaCon Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where MovDtaCon >= &DtaIni and MovDtaCon <= &Dtafin Where PlanGrpDre = GrupoDRE.DespesaAdm Where MovItmSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovItmSts.IsEmpty() or MovItmSts.IsNull() Where MovSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovSts.IsNull() or MovSts.IsEmpty()
If &Adm = 1 // imprimi cabeçalho das venda se tiver registro Print DespesasAdministrativas &Adm = 2 EndIf
If PlanCod <> &PlanCod If not &PlanCod.isEmpty() Print DetailAdm // imprimi as despesas de venda &MovVlr = 0 EndIf EndIf &PlanCod = PlanCod &PlanCodNom = PlanCodNom &MovVlr += MovItmVlr &TotAdmMovVlr += MovItmVlr EndFor If &MovVlr > 0 Print DetailAdm // imprimi as despesas de venda EndIf &MovVlr = 0 &TotOpeMovVlr += &TotAdmMovVlr EndSub
Sub 'DespesaComPessoal' &TotPesMovVlr = 0 &Pes = 1 &MovVlr = 0 &PlanCod = 0 For each Order EmpCod,PlanGrpDre,PlanHiePadL,MovDtaCon Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where MovDtaCon >= &DtaIni and MovDtaCon <= &Dtafin Where PlanGrpDre = GrupoDRE.DespesaPes Where MovItmSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovItmSts.IsEmpty() or MovItmSts.IsNull() Where MovSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovSts.IsNull() or MovSts.IsEmpty()
If &Pes = 1 // imprimi cabeçalho das venda se tiver registro Print DespesaComPessoal &Pes = 2 EndIf
If PlanCod <> &PlanCod If not &PlanCod.isEmpty() Print DetailPessoal // imprimi as despesas de venda &MovVlr = 0 EndIf EndIf &PlanCod = PlanCod
&PlanCodNom = PlanCodNom &MovVlr += MovItmVlr &TotPesMovVlr += MovItmVlr EndFor If &MovVlr > 0 Print DetailPessoal // imprimi as despesas de venda EndIf
&MovVlr = 0 &TotOpeMovVlr += &TotPesMovVlr EndSub
Sub 'DespesasFinanceiras' &TotFinMovVlr = 0 &Fin = 1 &MovVlr = 0 &PlanCod = 0 For each Order EmpCod,PlanGrpDre,PlanHiePadL,MovDtaCon Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where MovDtaCon >= &DtaIni and MovDtaCon <= &Dtafin Where PlanGrpDre = GrupoDRE.DespesaFin Where MovItmSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovItmSts.IsEmpty() or MovItmSts.IsNull() Where MovSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovSts.IsNull() or MovSts.IsEmpty()
If &Fin = 1 // imprimi cabeçalho das Despesas Print DespesasFinanceiras &Fin = 2 EndIf
If PlanCod <> &PlanCod If not &PlanCod.isEmpty() Print DetailDespesasFinanceiras // imprimi as despesas Financeiras &MovVlr = 0 EndIf EndIf &PlanCod = PlanCod
&PlanCodNom = PlanCodNom &MovVlr += MovItmVlr &TotFinMovVlr += MovItmVlr EndFor If &MovVlr > 0 Print DetailDespesasFinanceiras // imprimi as despesas Financeiras EndIf &MovVlr = 0 &ResFinMovVlr += &TotFinMovVlr EndSub
Sub 'DespesasMonetarias' &TotMonMovVlr = 0 &Mon = 1 &MovVlr = 0 &PlanCod = 0 For each Order EmpCod,PlanGrpDre,PlanHiePadL,MovDtaCon Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where MovDtaCon >= &DtaIni and MovDtaCon <= &Dtafin Where PlanGrpDre = GrupoDRE.VariacaoMon Where MovItmSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovItmSts.IsEmpty() or MovItmSts.IsNull() Where MovSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovSts.IsNull() or MovSts.IsEmpty()
If &Mon = 1 // imprimi cabeçalho das Despesas Print VariacaoMonetaria &Mon = 2 EndIf
If PlanCod <> &PlanCod If not &PlanCod.isEmpty() Print DetailVariacao // imprimi as despesas Financeiras &MovVlr = 0 EndIf EndIf &PlanCod = PlanCod
&PlanCodNom = PlanCodNom &MovVlr += MovItmVlr
&TotMonMovVlr += MovItmVlr EndFor If &MovVlr > 0 Print DetailVariacao // imprimi as despesas de venda EndIf &MovVlr = 0 &ResFinMovVlr += &TotMonMovVlr EndSub
Sub 'ReceitasFinanceiras' &TotRecMovVlr = 0 &RecFin = 1 &MovVlr = 0 &PlanCod = 0 For each Order EmpCod,PlanGrpDre,PlanHiePadL,MovDtaCon Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where MovDtaCon >= &DtaIni and MovDtaCon <= &Dtafin Where PlanGrpDre = GrupoDRE.ReceitaFin Where MovItmSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovItmSts.IsEmpty() or MovItmSts.IsNull() Where MovSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovSts.IsNull() or MovSts.IsEmpty()
If &RecFin = 1 // imprimi cabeçalho das Despesas Print ReceitasFinanceiras &RecFin = 2 EndIf
If PlanCod <> &PlanCod If not &PlanCod.isEmpty() Print DetailRecFin // imprimi as despesas Financeiras &MovVlr = 0 EndIf EndIf &PlanCod = PlanCod
&PlanCodNom = PlanCodNom &MovVlr += MovItmVlr &TotRecMovVlr += MovItmVlr EndFor If &MovVlr > 0 Print DetailRecFin // imprimi as despesas de venda EndIf &MovVlr = 0 &ResFinMovVlr += &TotRecMovVlr EndSub
Sub 'OutrasDespesas' &TotOutDspMovVlr = 0 &Fin = 1 &MovVlr = 0 &PlanCod = 0 For each Order EmpCod,PlanGrpDre,PlanHiePadL,MovDtaCon Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where MovDtaCon >= &DtaIni and MovDtaCon <= &Dtafin Where PlanGrpDre = GrupoDRE.OutrasDespesas Where MovItmSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovItmSts.IsEmpty() or MovItmSts.IsNull() Where MovSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovSts.IsNull() or MovSts.IsEmpty()
If &Fin = 1 // imprimi cabeçalho das Despesas Print OutrasDespesas &Fin = 2 EndIf
If PlanCod <> &PlanCod If not &PlanCod.isEmpty() Print DetailOutrasDesp // imprimi as despesas Financeiras &MovVlr = 0 EndIf EndIf &PlanCod = PlanCod
&PlanCodNom = PlanCodNom &MovVlr += MovItmVlr &TotOutDspMovVlr += MovItmVlr EndFor If &MovVlr > 0 Print DetailOutrasDesp // imprimi as despesas Financeiras EndIf &MovVlr = 0 &ResFinMovVlr += &TotOutDspMovVlr EndSub
Sub 'OutrasReceitas' &TotOutRecMovVlr = 0 &Fin = 1 &MovVlr = 0 &PlanCod = 0 For each Order EmpCod,PlanGrpDre,PlanHiePadL,MovDtaCon Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where MovDtaCon >= &DtaIni and MovDtaCon <= &Dtafin Where PlanGrpDre = GrupoDRE.OutrasReceitas Where MovItmSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovItmSts.IsEmpty() or MovItmSts.IsNull() Where MovSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovSts.IsNull() or MovSts.IsEmpty()
If &Fin = 1 // imprimi cabeçalho das Despesas Print OutrasReceitas &Fin = 2 EndIf
If PlanCod <> &PlanCod If not &PlanCod.isEmpty() Print DetailOutrasRec // imprimi as despesas Financeiras &MovVlr = 0 EndIf EndIf &PlanCod = PlanCod
&PlanCodNom = PlanCodNom &MovVlr += MovItmVlr &TotOutRecMovVlr += MovItmVlr EndFor If &MovVlr > 0 Print DetailOutrasRec // imprimi as despesas Financeiras EndIf &MovVlr = 0 &ResFinMovVlr += &TotOutRecMovVlr EndSub
Sub 'Provisao' &TotProvMovVlr = 0 &Fin = 1 &MovVlr = 0 &PlanCod = 0 For each Order EmpCod,PlanGrpDre,PlanHiePadL,MovDtaCon Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where MovDtaCon >= &DtaIni and MovDtaCon <= &Dtafin Where PlanGrpDre = GrupoDRE.ProvisaoIR Where MovItmSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovItmSts.IsEmpty() or MovItmSts.IsNull() Where MovSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovSts.IsNull() or MovSts.IsEmpty()
If &Fin = 1 // imprimi cabeçalho das Despesas Print Provisoes &Fin = 2 EndIf
If PlanCod <> &PlanCod If not &PlanCod.isEmpty() Print DetailProvisao // imprimi as despesas Financeiras &MovVlr = 0 EndIf EndIf &PlanCod = PlanCod
&PlanCodNom = PlanCodNom &MovVlr += MovItmVlr &TotProvMovVlr += MovItmVlr EndFor If &MovVlr > 0 Print DetailProvisao // imprimi as despesas Financeiras EndIf &MovVlr = 0 &ResProMovVlr += &TotProvMovVlr EndSub
Sub 'ZerarTotalPedido' //Produto &TotCarCreVlrDup = 0 &TotDinCreVlrDup = 0 &TotDupCreVlrDup = 0 &TotChePCreVlrDup = 0 &TotCheTCreVlrDup = 0 //Mercadoria &TotMarCarCreVlrDup = 0 &TotMerDinCreVlrDup = 0 &TotMerDupCreVlrDup = 0 &TotMerChePCreVlrDup = 0 &TotMerCheTCreVlrDup = 0 //serviço &TotSerCarCreVlrDup = 0 &TotSerDinCreVlrDup = 0 &TotSerDupCreVlrDup = 0 &TotSerChePCreVlrDup = 0 &TotSerCheTCreVlrDup = 0
EndSub
Sub 'PlanosSemDre' &TotSemMovVlr = 0 &Fin = 1 &MovVlr = 0 &PlanCod = 0
For each Order EmpCod,PlanGrpDre,PlanHiePadL,MovDtaCon Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where MovDtaCon >= &DtaIni and MovDtaCon <= &Dtafin Where PlanGrpDre.isEmpty() or PlanGrpDre.isNull() Where MovItmSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovItmSts.IsEmpty() or MovItmSts.IsNull() Where MovSts <> Status_Caixa.Cancelado or MovSts.IsNull() or MovSts.IsEmpty()
If &Fin = 1 // imprimi cabeçalho das Despesas Print PlanoSemDre &Fin = 2 EndIf
If PlanCod <> &PlanCod If not &PlanCod.isEmpty() If &MovCreDeb = 'D' &MovVlr = &MovVlr*-1 EndIf
Print DetailSemDre // imprimi as despesas Financeiras &MovVlr = 0 EndIf EndIf &PlanCod = PlanCod &MovCreDeb = MovCreDeb &PlanCodNom = PlanCodNom &MovVlr += MovItmVlr &TotSemMovVlr += MovItmVlr EndFor If &MovVlr > 0 If &MovCreDeb = 'D' &MovVlr = &MovVlr*-1 EndIf Print DetailSemDre // imprimi as despesas Financeiras EndIf &MovVlr = 0
EndSub

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Respeite o meio ambiente. Evite a impressão desnecessária deste documento!

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: DRE - Demostrativo do Resultado do Exercício
